top_signals.title: 'Massive outperformance': Goldman Sachs on why North Asian stocks are beating those in the south
top_signals.summary: North Asian markets are outperforming South Asian markets, supported by stronger fiscal ability and AI developments, Goldman said.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Commodity repricing impacting inflation expectations and industrial supply chains.

top_signals.title: MQ-25A Stingray cleared for deployment, says Cao
top_signals.summary: The role of the MQ-25A is intended to provide the Carrier Air Wing with unmanned refueling, freeing up F/A-18E/F aircraft to focus on strike missions.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Singapore Beats Indonesia as Biggest Southeast Asia Stock Market
top_signals.summary: Indonesia continues to notch one grim milestone after another. The latest: losing its status as Southeast Asia’s largest stock market to Singapore.
